description:
Overview:
1. 5000Pa suction, pressurized air flow gathers soot and residue easily;
2. HEPA filter, prevent secondary pollution, not stained for a long time;
3. Mini size, put it into the cup holder or put it on the table;
4. With a blowing hose, use the air hose to clean the dust in the gap;
5. 6000mAh battery, it can be used for about 18 minutes with a full charge;
6. Large-capacity dust collection bin which can hold 60 ml of garbage.

Specifications:
Color: classification: starry sky black, bright moon white, dark night green, filter screen (three packs)
Brand Name: BASEUS
Item Height: 25.3cm
Item Length: 6cm
Item Width: 6cm
Material Type: ABS+PC
Item Type: Vacuum Cleaner
Special Features: Suction and Blow
Model Name: car vacuum cleaner,wireless vacuum cleaner
External Testing Certification: ROHS
Battery Capacity: 6000mAh
Max Suction: 5000Pa
Dust holder capacity: 60mL
Charge cable: Type C
Charging time: About 3-3.5 hours
Battery Duration: About 18min
Rated power: 70W
Noise: About 75db

Package Size:
350x400x150mm

Package Content:
1 x Car Vacuum Cleaner
